overall.description: Static shot of a luxury cyberpunk apartment bedroom from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring an unmade bed, large windows overlooking a foggy night cityscape, and a wall-mounted TV cycling through various news broadcasts, advertisements, and animations. The room features warm wooden ceiling slats, neon wall accents, and remains completely still throughout the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury bedroom with entertainment screen overlooking city

events.description: wall-mounted television switches from abstract pattern to news broadcast with female anchor
television displays cartoon bear face animation followed by anime-style character
television shows breaking news alert with red text displaying percentage statistics

agents.ego_description: standing stationary in the bedroom observing the television and room interior

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling windows with horizontal blinds revealing foggy orange-lit cityscape outside
messy bed with gray sheets and pillows in the foreground
large flatscreen television displaying cycling content including news, ads, and animations
curved ceiling with parallel wooden slats and recessed lighting
red neon wall decoration with FC lettering above the television
glowing blue-green digital wall feature resembling an aquarium or abstract art
open book or magazine resting on the bed sheets

segments.scene_description: A static view of a cyberpunk luxury bedroom with an unmade bed in the foreground and a large window revealing a foggy night cityscape. The wall-mounted television cycles through various broadcasts including news segments with a female anchor, advertisements, cartoon animations, and breaking news alerts. The room features warm wooden ceiling slats, neon wall accents, and remains completely still with no physical movement or character presence.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, atmospheric gaze over a luxury cyberpunk bedroom as the digital displays within the room cycle through a series of shifting broadcasts. It begins with a view of an unmade bed in the foreground, set against a large window that reveals a dense, foggy night cityscape. As the camera remains still, the wall-mounted television transitions from news segments featuring a female anchor into a sequence of vibrant advertisements and cartoon animations. The scene then shifts further as the screen displays urgent breaking news alerts, while the room's warm wooden ceiling slats and neon wall accents provide a constant, glowing contrast to the cold city outside.
